channel.title: Posts on In That Number
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on In That Number

item.title: A first dive into comics data
item.description: I’m still getting a feel for the right questions to ask. Comic books have been a super important part of my life for the past decade. Comics have figured differently in my life over time, but they’ve maintained a lasting influence over my pop culture choices. As I write this, a tiny Spider-man is watching over my shoulder. In that spirit, my first post will focus on how comic book characters have changed throughout history.

item.title: What makes comic book characters popular?
item.description: I’m still getting a feel for the right questions to ask. Comic books have been a super important part of my life for the past decade. Comics have figured differently in my life over time, but they’ve maintained a lasting influence over my pop culture choices. As I write this, a tiny Spider-man is watching over my shoulder. In that spirit, my first post will focus on how comic book characters have changed throughout history.

item.title: My first post
item.description: I’ve been interested in the field of data journalism for about two months now. This blog is an attempt to figure out what intersection of data tinkering and visualization works best for my skillset.
